decision_option: Repair remaining candidate metadata
option_scope: metadata-only identity, annotation, checksum, quota, and finite resource-envelope repair
authorization_required: no execution authority granted by this option
requirements_or_blockers: Remain metadata-only; do not download biological payloads, submit jobs, build genotype data, or infer demography.

decision_option: Request authorization for a numerically bounded expansion wave
option_scope: a separately reviewed finite species wave; not full-catalog execution
authorization_required: yes before any acquisition, execution, expansion, or inference
requirements_or_blockers: A new request must numerically state exact species/accessions, compressed input, scratch, core-hours, concurrency, per-job memory, persistent storage, retention/expiry, I/O, and rollback; it must satisfy every stricter cap and receive a new exact GO.

decision_option: Request authorization for a population-data subset
option_scope: exact-reference, exact-population subset for method-specific input validation
authorization_required: yes before any acquisition, execution, expansion, or inference
requirements_or_blockers: A new request must numerically state exact species/reference/population/sample/asset identities, compressed input, scratch, core-hours, concurrency, per-job memory, storage, retention/expiry, I/O, and rollback. Raw bulk download and each PSMC/MSMC2/SMC++ inference require separate explicit authority; VGP H1/H2 is not an input shortcut.

decision_option: Stop
option_scope: retain the reviewed refusal and metadata audit as the terminal evidence packet
authorization_required: no execution authority granted by this option
requirements_or_blockers: No further resource or biological action.
